name: studio.update_post
description: Edit an existing blog post's fields (title, slug, body, author, categories, tags). Does NOT publish.
whenToUse: Editorial revision to an existing draft before an approved publish.
Spelling / link-correction sweep across one or more published posts; status remains published after update.
Taxonomy rewrite: move a post between categories or refresh its tag set.
whenNotToUse: Post does not exist yet — use studio.create_post; update_post fails on unknown post_id.
Caller wants atomic edit-and-publish — compose update_post + studio.publish_post, or write a composite skill.
Caller is editing a static page, not a blog post — use studio.update_page.
